news.headline: Bitcoin's price dips during economic crises due to increased market uncertainty, temporary decrease in value explained by Bitwise CIO.
news.summary: Bitwise's CIO, Matt Hougan, discussed Bitcoin's behavior during market crises, noting its contradictory nature despite being seen as an inflation hedge. Hougan attributed short-term price drops during economic turmoil to heightened market uncertainty, which increases the perceived risk of the asset, resulting in a temporary decrease in value, known as a "discount factor." Hougan cited tariff concerns as an example, which have impacted Bitcoin recently. While tariffs raise short-term risk, they can also increase the long-term price target. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

Australia cracks down on crypto scammers posing as Binance in Operation Firestorm, disrupting a major scam.
news.summary: Authorities in Australia successfully disrupted a sophisticated crypto scam through Operation Firestorm. The scam involved impersonating Binance, one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges in the world. This operation resulted in preventing a significant number of individuals from falling victim to the scam and losing their money.

news.headline: Founder of Gotbit surrenders $23M in plea deal tied to crypto market manipulation, may avoid prison and extra fines with court approval.
news.summary: The founder of Gotbit could potentially avoid prison time and additional fines if their plea agreement is approved by the court. This agreement may only require forfeiture without any further financial penalties or jail term.

news.headline: The central bank is uncertain, which is acceptable.
Bitnomial withdraws SEC lawsuit prior to XRP futures launch in the US. CFTC-regulated XRP futures available from March 20 for current users. Regulatory clarity cited.
news.summary: Bitnomial, a Chicago-based crypto exchange, has dropped its lawsuit against the SEC in preparation for launching Ripple XRP futures in the US. The futures, regulated by the CFTC, will be available for users starting March 20. Bitnomial had filed for XRP futures in August 2024 but was blocked by the SEC, leading to the lawsuit. The SEC's jurisdiction over XRP as a security has been disputed, with a judge ruling it not a security for retail sales but possibly for institutional sales. The SEC's ongoing legal battle with Ripple Labs began in December 2020. Amidst changing leadership, the SEC under Mark Uyeda is easing its crypto regulations, including dropping proposed rules on crypto custody standards and potentially including crypto firms as exchanges.

news.headline: 111, Inc. reports positive financial results with RMB332.7 million YoY improvement in operating profit and decreased operating expenses by 230 and 470 basis points in Q4'24.
news.summary: In the year 2024, the company attained its first-ever annual operating profit, with an increase of RMB332.7 million compared to the previous year. The operating expenses as a percentage of revenues decreased by 230 basis points year over year in 2024. Additionally, in the fourth quarter of 2024, this percentage saw a decrease of 470 basis points compared to the previous year. This significant improvement in financial performance highlights the company's successful cost management strategies and overall growth trajectory.

BlackRock's Mitchnick optimistic on Bitcoin in recession, says it thrives on fiscal spending and stimulus. Bitcoin at $86,000 up 3.8%. Meet lawyer Max Burwick.
news.summary: Robbie Mitchnick, head of digital assets at BlackRock, believes that Bitcoin will thrive in a recessionary environment due to factors like increased fiscal spending, deficit accumulation, lower interest rates, and monetary stimulus. Mitchnick stated that Bitcoin tends to be catalyzed by fears of social disorder, which can arise during recessions. He emphasized that Bitcoin should be viewed as uncorrelated or inversely correlated against certain risk factors. Mitchnick mentioned that while some perceive Bitcoin as a risk-on asset, it is still a relatively nascent asset class requiring education. BlackRock has been assisting clients in navigating these conflicting narratives, with some seeing market corrections as buying opportunities. On the other hand, researchers from Coinbase Institutional expressed concerns about crypto markets due to recession fears and recent tariffs. BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF, holding $48.7 billion in net assets, has played a significant role in institutional adoption of Bitcoin. Mitchnick downplayed recent net outflows from Bitcoin exchange-traded funds, attributing them to hedge funds unwinding spot futures arbitrage trades. Bitcoin is currently valued at $86,000, reflecting a 3.8% increase over the last 24 hours.

Tezos unveils Trailblazers Initiative for innovators to fuel ecosystem growth with impactful missions. Join now! #Tezos #Trailblazers
news.summary: Tezos has launched the Trailblazers initiative, calling on individuals to participate in the program and help bolster the ecosystem's advancement with a series of meaningful tasks. This program aims to engage builders, creators, and changemakers, offering them opportunities to contribute to the growth of Tezos through a range of impactful missions. The Trailblazers program is designed to foster collaboration and innovation within the community, with participants encouraged to get involved in initiatives that promote the development and expansion of Tezos. Join now to be a part of this exciting opportunity!

news.headline: S&P 500 rises over 1% post Fed decision, Fear & Greed Index in 'extreme fear' zone. Fed maintains rate at 4.25% - 4.5%. Stocks settle higher. Fed projects 2 rate cuts in 2025; concerns of stagflation. Nvidia Corp. rises 1.8%.
news.summary: The latest data from the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated some improvement in market sentiment, although it remained within the "Extreme Fear" zone on Wednesday. US stocks saw a positive trend, with the S&P 500 climbing over 1% throughout the trading day. The Federal Reserve opted to keep the federal funds rate steady within a range of 4.25% to 4.5%, and Chairman Jerome Powell addressed concerns about potential inflationary impacts of new tariffs by referring to them as "transitory." Despite forecasting two rate cuts in 2025 according to the latest dot plot, the Fed's projections now suggest reduced growth and increased inflation, leading to worries about stagflation. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) experienced a 1.8% increase in its stock price. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stock futures up on Thursday, Accenture (NYSE:ACN) to report $2.82 EPS on $16.62B revenue. Shares up 0.3%.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are up, drawing attention to potential stock movers. Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is anticipated to announce earnings of $2.82 per share and revenue of $16.62 billion for the quarter before market open. After hours, Accenture shares rose 0.3% to $325.30. This information is sourced from Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: Wall Street forecasters anticipate Darden Restaurants to deliver Q3 earnings of $2.79 per share and revenue of $3.22 billion, up from $2.62 per share and $2.97 billion, respectively, in the previous year. Darden shares closed at $188.15.
news.summary: The third-quarter financial results of Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) are set to be released on Thursday, March 20. Analysts predict earnings to be at $2.79 per share, a rise from the previous year's $2.62 per share. Revenue is anticipated to reach $3.22 billion for this quarter, up from $2.97 billion the previous year. In the second quarter report from Dec. 19, 2024, adjusted earnings per share were reported at $2.03, surpassing the estimated $2.02. Darden Restaurants' stock closed at $188.15, with a slight 0.1% increase on Wednesday. Further information and analyst ratings can be found on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Standard Chartered Hong Kong: HKD Best Lending Rate Unchanged
Trader warns against heavy leverage on FOMC meeting, $188.77M liquidated, Bitcoin up 3.49%, BTC at $87,427 briefly. Source: CoinMarketCap.
news.summary: Following the Federal Reserve's decision to keep the US interest rates unchanged, the crypto market experienced an upswing, catching traders who had bet on a downside off guard. MN Trading Capital founder Michael van de Poppe warned against heavy leverage usage, emphasizing the risks. CoinGlass data indicated $188.77 million liquidated from the market, with $127.80 million from short positions. Bitcoin surged 3.84% to $87,427 post-Powell's speech before declining to $85,760. Total liquidated short positions amounted to approximately $257.03 million over the past 24 hours. Ether rose by 2.27%, XRP by 2.40%, and Bitcoin by 3.49% in the same period. Van de Poppe highlighted the significance of Powell's words on defining Bitcoin's future price actions. However, analysts like Crypto trading account BitcoinHyper and Matt Mena forecasted a potential short-term boost in Bitcoin due to the Federal Reserve's "dovish shift" but caution against new long positions at current levels. Powell projected interest rates at 3.9% by 2025 and 3.4% by 2026. The broader macro environment supports a bullish outlook for BTC despite near-term uncertainties. The article concluded by advising readers to conduct their research on investment decisions.

news.headline: Jabil to release Q2 results with earnings expected at $1.83/share on $6.4B revenue. Shares rose 2.9% to $139.48.
news.summary: Tech giant Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) is set to unveil its second-quarter financial results on March 20. Analysts predict earnings of $1.83 per share for the quarter, up from $1.68 per share a year ago. The company anticipates quarterly revenue of $6.4 billion, a drop from $6.77 billion in the prior year. In collaboration with Apptronik, Jabil announced plans to develop Apollo humanoid robots for use in specific manufacturing processes. Jabil's stock price closed at $139.48, marking a 2.9% increase on Wednesday. For more detailed information, readers can access the full story on Benzinga.com, including the latest analyst ratings and other insights.

news.headline: Zeekr Group's Q4 2024: 79,250 vehicle deliveries, 39.2% revenue increase, 19.0% gross margin, 51.3% decrease in loss from operations. FY2024: 222,123 total deliveries, 46.9% revenue increase. CEO plans further expansion.
news.summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited reported unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. In Q4, total vehicle deliveries were 79,250 units (99.8% YoY increase) and vehicle sales were RMB19,301.6 million. Total revenues were RMB22,777.8 million, with gross profit of RMB4,316.5 million. Net loss was RMB820.6 million. For full year 2024, total revenues were RMB75,912.7 million, with RMB55,315.3 million from vehicle sales. Gross profit for the year was RMB12,447.5 million. Cash and cash equivalents were RMB8,961.7 million as of December 31, 2024. The company announced strategic developments, new product launches, and CEO and CFO comments regarding future strategies in expanding their product lineup and global presence.

news.headline: Balatro wins Game of the Year at 25th Game Developers Choice Awards, with 4 total wins; premiere awards in digital games industry.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the indie roguelike deckbuilding game Balatro has emerged victorious at the 25th annual Game Developers Choice Awards (GDCA). The game clinched the prestigious Game of the Year Award along with wins in the categories of Best Debut, Innovation Award, and Best Design, accumulating a remarkable four wins overall. The GDCAs stand as the foremost honors for peer acknowledgment in the digital games sector, acknowledging and lauding the creativity and excellence within the industry.

Brigadier General Paul Craft (Ret.) named President-Defense at DataShapes AI. Longest-serving Chief of Cyber for U.S. Army.
news.summary: The former Chief of Cyber for the U.S. Army, who held the position for the longest tenure on record, has now taken on the role of president for DataShapes AI's defense business. This announcement was made in Charlottesville, Virginia on March 20, 2025. DataShapes AI, Inc., known for its advancements in artificial intelligence technologies, including distributed AI agents, has welcomed the experienced individual to lead their defense sector.
